link.description: Get started with MagePeople plugins — installation, activation, configuration, and troubleshooting.
Advanced coupon management for WooCommerce — dynamic discounts and promotional rules.
Car rental management plugin — manage fleet, drivers, and vehicle bookings.
Taxi booking plugin documentation — manage cabs, drivers, and ride bookings.
Appointment booking plugin documentation — manage services, staff, and reservations.
Bus ticket booking plugin documentation — manage bus routes, schedules, and bookings.
Deposit and partial payment plugin — offer flexible payment options on bookings.
Equipment rental plugin — manage inventory, availability, and reservations.
Event management plugin documentation — create, manage, and sell event tickets.
Food ordering plugin — manage menus, restaurants, and online food orders.
Group booking plugin — allow group reservations and manage group pricing.
Gym management plugin — manage memberships, classes, and trainer schedules.
Rental management plugin documentation — rent vehicles, equipment, and more.
Travel booking plugin documentation — tours, packages, and travel management.
Explore all MagePeople plugins — booking, travel, event, rental, and eCommerce solutions.
Direct bank transfer payment gateway for booking plugins.
Add custom fields to the checkout page for booking plugins.
Elementor widgets for WooCommerce booking forms and displays.
Extend your MagePeople plugins with powerful addons.
Technical documentation for developers — hooks, filters, REST API, and customization guides.
Video tutorials and walkthroughs for MagePeople plugins.
